evidence.snippet:
Lightweight 8–12 hp single-piston UAV engine, air-cooled. Available in gasoline or heavy-fuel variants, compatible with kerosene-class aviation fuels (Jet A-1 and equivalents) for professional unmanned platforms.

14.0 Nm at 6’000 rpm

products.name: RHW-1100-D / TD
products.descriptor: Compact 1.1 L three-cylinder diesel power unit, naturally aspirated or turbocharged, for APU and vehicle integration

evidence.snippet:
Three-cylinder 1.1 L diesel engine, naturally aspirated (D) or turbocharged (TD).
Developed for auxiliary power systems and demanding ground-based platforms, it delivers reliable torque and endurance in a very compact footprint.

The RHW-1100 is not offered as a standalone commercial engine.
It is supplied exclusively as a **complete engineered system**, ensuring validated integration, long-term stability and consistent operational performance across all use cases.

products.notes: Page explicitly states "supplied exclusively as a complete engineered system".

products.name: Suter APU 8.5 kW
products.descriptor: Compact 8.5 kW 28 VDC liquid-cooled auxiliary power unit for vehicle integration or stand-alone field use

evidence.snippet:
APU 8.5 kW
_COMPACT MODULAR_
_AUXILIARY POWER UNIT_
Lightweight 28 VDC auxiliary power unit for integration in vehicles or as a stand-alone (H-APU) in shelters or demanding field systems.**
High power-to-weight ratio with up to 50% space and weight savings compared to benchmark systems.
**Only known APU with **CAN-BUS interface SAE J1939 in this power range.**

APU 8.5 kW
Parameter
Value
Constant output
8.5 kW @ sea level
Rated voltage & power
28 VDC

FOA 660 SDI Heavy Fuel dedicated page (resource-0013) was skipped_budget — classified as prototype from overview '*under development juli 2026*' note only.
Suter H-APU 8.5 kW dedicated page was skipped_budget — readiness set to unknown; product exists as the stand-alone shelter variant of the APU 8.5 kW but no individual spec page was fetched.
